clusters.justification: These terms rely on paralimbic and amygdalar networks to process emotional arousal, subjective feeling states, and emotional valence.
This cluster captures the core functions of cortico-striatal networks dedicated to outcome prediction, reward assessment, and motivated goal-directed choice.

These concepts describe self-generated and externally directed interpersonal thought, mapping onto transmodal cortical territories that integrate self-referential memory with the abstract representation of others.
